descriptionEn:
Akrogiali is a seafood taverna in Nea Potidea, located directly beside the beach and welcoming guests since 2002. Its relaxed atmosphere, sea-view terrace and waterfront setting create an inviting choice for a peaceful lunch or an open-air Mediterranean dinner.

The menu draws inspiration from Greek and Mediterranean cuisine, featuring fish, seafood, fresh vegetable salads and sharing-style dishes. Booking ahead is recommended for weekend dinners and busy summer evenings. For reservations or additional information, please complete the form in the app.
